lineage.Process:
CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] = 7 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2

End If"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] = 7 And [NBR_LANES] <3 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2

End If"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] = 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] = 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.35

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.35
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.4

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.35
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.4
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.67
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.7
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.8
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.4

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.35
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.4
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.67
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.7
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.8
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.4

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS RoadStressFactorAdd RoadStressFactorAdd VB "If [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.1
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] >= 7 And [NBR_LANES] <=2 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.15
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.35
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.4
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] <=25 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.67
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.7
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] =30 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 1.8
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=2 And [NBR_LANES] <=3 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=4 And [NBR_LANES] <=5 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.2
ELSEIF [DOT_FC] < 7 And [NBR_LANES] >=6 And [SPD_LMT] >=35 Then
RoadStressFactorAdd = 2.4

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = .05
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = .5

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.05
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.5

End If
"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.05
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.5

End If"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.05
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.5
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BBL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.65

End If"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.1
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.5
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BBL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.65
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SBL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SUL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SUP" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "NGW" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75

End If"

CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Nov2016_NetworkMRS BikeStressFactorSubtract BikeStressFactorSubtract VB "If [ExistBikeFacil] = "BR" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.1
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.5
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "BBL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.65
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SBL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SUL" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "SUP" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75
ELSEIF [ExistBikeFacil] = "NGW" Then
BikeStressFactorSubtract = 0.75

End If
"
CalculateField BikeFacilitiesTDM_Jan2017_NetworkSlopeStressMRS PlanSource "CDOT bike plan / RPA 2010 plan" VB #

CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Buffered Bike Lane" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Separated Bike Lane" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Shared Use Lane" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Shared Use Path" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 PropClass "Buffered Bike Lane" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 PropClass "Separated Bike Lane" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 PropClass "Shared Use Path" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Shared Use Path (Park)" VB #
CalculateField TPOBikeFacilities_March2017 ExistClass "Shared Use Path (Park)" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "High Stress Route" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "Medium Stress Facility" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "Low Stress Bike Facility" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "Medium Stress Bike Facility" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "High Stress Bike Route" VB #
CalculateField "Low to High Stress Routes" NewClass "Low Stress Shared-Use Facility" VB #
CopyFeatures "Bike Routes" "C:\Users\bkuyrkendall\OneDrive - TSW\Organizations\Bike Walk CHA\Bike Map\CHA Area Bike Map\Export\Bike Routes.shp" # # # #

itemLocation.linkage: file://\\HUMPF\C$\Users\bkuyrkendall\OneDrive - TSW\Organizations\Bike Walk CHA\Bike Map\CHA Area Bike Map\Export\Bike Routes.shp

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
